description: M-26-14 Element 5: Detects drops in log integrity hash coverage per data stream — low_count on hashed docs

detectors.detector_description: low_count of integrity-hashed docs per data_stream.dataset — drops signal pipeline failure or bypass

custom_settings.m2614_requirement: Element 5 — Log Management | M-26-14 §3 Hashing and Integrity
custom_settings.m2614_acceptance_criteria: Detects hash pipeline failure (zero hashed docs for any dataset in a 1h bucket) within 2h of onset. Detects new unhashed data streams within first hourly bucket of data arrival.
custom_settings.m2614_description: M-26-14 Element 5: Counts integrity-hashed log events (event.integrity.hashed == true) per data stream per hour. A sudden count drop to zero indicates the m2614-log-integrity-hash ingest pipeline failed, was bypassed, or was not applied to a data stream. Datafeed query pre-filters to hashed docs only so zero-count anomalies fire precisely when hashing stops. Required for Element 5 L3+ compliance health monitoring.
